title: Logs errors shows a clear empty state
description: Black-box smoke for `orca logs errors` when the errors log file does not exist yet.
input: Run `orca logs errors` in an isolated empty ORCA_HOME and verify the command shows the empty-state message instead of crashing.
command: bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_ROOT=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf $TMP_ROOT" EXIT; mkdir -p "$TMP_ROOT/home"; env -i PATH="$PATH" HOME="$TMP_ROOT/home" ORCA_HOME="$TMP_ROOT/home/.orca" node dist/bin/orca.js logs errors'
